title: What kind of music triggers impulse buying? — Daniel Fox
meta_description: Impulse purchases are triggered by environmental cues, and music is one of the strongest. Arousing, pleasant music lowers deliberation and raises spontaneous buying — here's the mechanism and the research.

schema.headline: What kind of music triggers impulse buying?
schema.description: How arousing, pleasant music lowers self-control and increases spontaneous purchases, with the supporting research.
